allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''ID: {s[""id""]}\\nPhrases: {s[""matchPhrases""]}\\nResponse: {s[""response""][:120]}...\\n''''\) for s in data]")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''data/segmentation.json'',''utf8''\)\); const ids=d.map\(x=>x.id\); console.log\(''segmentation.json OK — entries:'', ids.length, ''/ unique IDs:'', new Set\(ids\).size\)")
